product_overview: SEAPEDIA is a multi-role marketplace for browsing products, managing seller stores, buying with wallet checkout, and handling delivery workflows. It also includes public reviews, role-based dashboards, discounts, and admin monitoring for a full end-to-end commerce demo.
core_goals: Browse the public marketplace catalog and product details as a guest or logged-in user
Register, sign in, sign out, and select an active role for role-based access
Submit and view public application reviews safely
Let sellers create stores and manage products that appear in the public catalog
Let buyers manage wallet balance, delivery address, cart, and checkout
Apply vouchers and promos during checkout with tax and delivery fees
Track buyer order history and status timelines
Process seller orders and support driver delivery workflows
Provide admin monitoring and discount management capabilities

features.name: Public marketplace catalog
features.description: Users can browse the public SEAPEDIA marketplace, view products from seller stores, and open product detail pages without logging in.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse the public product catalog -> Open a product listing -> View product details with store information
Navigate to /products -> Browse and filter products -> Open a product card -> View product pricing, stock, and store details
Navigate to /products -> Browse the catalog as a guest -> Open a product detail page -> Return to the catalog to continue browsing

features.name: Authentication and multi-role sessions
features.description: Users can register, sign in, sign out, and choose an active role when they own more than one role.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-up -> Enter registration details -> Submit the form -> See account creation confirmation
Navigate to /sign-in -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> See the role selection page when multiple roles are owned
Navigate to /select-role -> Choose one available role -> Continue into the matching dashboard
Navigate to /sign-in -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> See the dashboard for the active role
From any authenticated session -> Sign out -> Return to the public experience

features.name: Application reviews
features.description: Users can submit public reviews about the SEAPEDIA app experience and view submitted testimonials on public pages.
user_flows: Navigate to the public landing page -> Open the review section -> Enter name, rating, and comment -> Submit the review -> See the new review in the public list
Navigate to the public landing page -> Open the review section -> Browse submitted testimonials -> Read other users' comments and ratings

features.name: Seller store and product management
features.description: Sellers can create a unique store, then add, edit, and delete products for their own store.
user_flows: Navigate to /seller/store -> Enter store details -> Save the store profile -> See the store information displayed
Navigate to /seller/products/new -> Enter product details -> Save the product -> See the product appear in the seller product list and public catalog
Navigate to /seller/products -> Open an existing product for editing -> Change product details or stock -> Save changes -> See the updated product in the list
Navigate to /seller/products -> Select a product to remove -> Confirm deletion -> See the product removed from the seller list

features.name: Buyer wallet and address
features.description: Buyers can top up wallet balance and maintain a single delivery address for checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /buyer/wallet -> Enter a top-up amount -> Submit the top-up -> See the wallet balance increase and the transaction appear in history
Navigate to /buyer/address -> Enter delivery address details -> Save the address -> See the stored address displayed
Navigate to /buyer/wallet -> Review wallet balance and transaction history -> Confirm available funds for checkout

features.name: Shopping cart with single-store rule
features.description: Buyers can add products to cart, update quantities, and remove items while the cart stays limited to one store at a time.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Open a product from one store -> Add it to the cart -> Open the cart and see the item added
Navigate to /products -> Open another product from the same store -> Add it to the cart -> Open the cart and see both items together
Navigate to /products -> Open a product from a different store -> Try to add it to the cart -> See the store conflict warning and resolve it by clearing the cart first
Navigate to /buyer/cart -> Change item quantity -> See the cart totals update -> Remove an item -> See the cart summary update

features.name: Checkout with tax, delivery, and discounts
features.description: Buyers can preview and place orders with delivery methods, discounts, tax, wallet payment, and stock changes.
user_flows: Navigate to /buyer/checkout -> Review cart items -> Choose a delivery method -> View subtotal, delivery fee, PPN 12%, and final total -> Place the order -> See the order created with status Sedang Dikemas
Navigate to /buyer/checkout -> Enter a voucher or promo code -> Review the discounted summary -> Confirm checkout -> See the final total charged to the wallet
Navigate to /buyer/checkout -> Select a delivery method -> Review the preview totals -> Change the delivery method -> See the delivery fee and final total update before confirming
Navigate to /buyer/checkout -> Review the summary -> Attempt checkout with insufficient wallet balance -> See the checkout blocked by the user's own balance validation

features.name: Voucher and promo discounts
features.description: Discount codes can be applied at checkout and are managed through admin discount resources.
user_flows: Navigate to /buyer/checkout -> Enter a voucher code -> Preview the order summary -> See the discount reflected in the total
Navigate to /buyer/checkout -> Enter a promo code -> Preview the order summary -> See the discount reflected in the total
Navigate to /buyer/checkout -> Enter both a voucher and a promo that are allowed together -> Preview the order summary -> See both discounts applied according to the configured rules

features.name: Buyer orders and spending reports
features.description: Buyers can review their order history, open order details, and see spending summaries with status timelines.
user_flows: Navigate to /buyer/orders -> Browse past orders -> Open an order -> View status history, discounts, delivery fee, tax, and final total
Navigate to /buyer -> Review the spending summary -> Open the order history section -> Compare spending across completed purchases
Navigate to /buyer/orders/[orderId] -> Inspect the order timeline -> See the current delivery status and timestamped transitions

features.name: Seller order processing and income reports
features.description: Sellers can review incoming orders, process eligible orders, and view revenue summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /seller/orders -> Browse incoming orders -> Open an order ready for processing -> Process the order -> See the status change from Sedang Dikemas to Menunggu Pengirim
Navigate to /seller/orders/[orderId] -> Open order details -> Review the timeline and item summary -> Return to the order list
Navigate to /seller -> Review the income summary -> Compare processed orders and revenue totals

features.name: Role dashboards and shared UI shell
features.description: Each role has a dedicated dashboard shell with shared navigation, theme toggle, and mobile navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See the shared dashboard shell -> Open the role-specific dashboard content
Navigate to /buyer -> See the buyer dashboard summary -> Use the shared navigation to move to related buyer pages
Navigate to /seller -> See the seller dashboard summary -> Use the shared navigation to move to store, products, or orders
Navigate to /admin -> See the admin dashboard summary -> Use the shared navigation to move through monitoring views
Navigate to /driver -> See the driver dashboard summary -> Use the shared navigation to view delivery work

features.name: Public marketplace catalog
features.description: Browse products from seller stores on the public catalog and product detail pages.

features.name: Authentication and multi-role sessions
features.description: Register, sign in, sign out, and switch active role (buyer, seller, driver, admin) via JWT cookie session.

features.name: Application reviews
features.description: Public reviews with star ratings and comments on the landing page.

features.name: Seller store and product management
features.description: Sellers create a store, add/edit/delete products, and manage inventory.

features.name: Buyer wallet and address
features.description: Buyers top up wallet balance and maintain a single delivery address.

features.name: Shopping cart with single-store rule
features.description: Buyers add products to cart; cart enforces items from one store only with conflict dialog.

features.name: Checkout with tax, delivery, and discounts
features.description: Checkout preview and place order with PPN, delivery fee, optional voucher and promo codes, wallet debit, and stock decrement.

features.name: Voucher and promo discounts
features.description: Admin-managed vouchers and promos applied at checkout; one voucher plus one promo per order with usage limits.

features.name: Buyer orders and spending reports
features.description: Buyers view order history, order detail with status timeline and discount breakdown, and spending summary on dashboard.

features.name: Seller order processing and income reports
features.description: Sellers view incoming orders, process orders to packing status, see order detail timeline, and revenue summary.

features.name: Role dashboards and shared UI shell
features.description: Dashboard shells for admin, seller, buyer, and driver with navbar, theme toggle, and mobile navigation.
